AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description:
Smoovie surfaces TMDB movies and TV shows and maintains the user's local watchlist.
Operational Patterns: - Use 'searchMovies' or 'searchTvShows' to resolve a free-form title into a numeric tmdbId before calling 'addToWatchlist' or 'removeFromWatchlist'. - Prefer the first result when the query is a precise title; ask the user to disambiguate when several results share similar release years. - 'listWatchlist' returns the user's saved entries with tmdbId values that are valid inputs to 'removeFromWatchlist'.
Constraints: - Watchlist mutations require a valid integer tmdbId from a prior search or list call; arbitrary IDs are rejected. - Search results are paged (20 per page) and capped at TMDB's upstream limits. - All network calls go through Firebase App Check; calls from unattested clients fail. - Regional availability of titles is determined by the user's configured region and cannot be overridden per call.
